title: Claude Devkit Audit Event Schema
description: JSON Schema for JSONL audit events emitted by /ship, /architect, and /audit skills. Fields are designed to map to OpenTelemetry span attributes for future Kagenti integration.

common_fields.description: Fields present in every audit event.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this skill run. Format: YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-xxxxxx. OTel: baggage.run_id (run_id format is not a valid OTel trace_id -- adapter must generate a proper 128-bit trace_id and carry run_id as baggage).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the event was emitted. Second precision (macOS date lacks nanosecond support). OTel: start_time / end_time (adapter converts to nanosecond Unix timestamps).

event_type.description: Type of audit event. OTel: determines span vs. span event -- step_start/step_end define span boundaries; verdict/security_decision map to span events (annotations).

skill.description: Name of the skill that emitted this event. OTel: service.name.

skill_version.description: Semver version of the skill. OTel: service.version.

security_maturity.description: Security maturity level active during this run. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.security_maturity.

sequence.description: Monotonic counter for total ordering within a run. Derived from wc -l of the log file at emit time. Preserved in OTel as span attribute devkit.ship.sequence (OTel timestamps do not guarantee ordering for concurrent spans).

step_fields.description: Fields present in step_start and step_end events.

step.description: Machine-readable step identifier. OTel: span.name. Used by adapter for span hierarchy reconstruction -- steps named step_3c are children of step_3.

step_name.description: Human-readable step description. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.step_name.

agent_type.description: Type of agent executing the step. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.agent_type.

work_groups.description: Number of parallel work groups (for dispatch steps). OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.work_groups.

oneOf.title: run_start
oneOf.description: Emitted once at the beginning of Step 0. Anchors the run in the log.

plan_file.description: Relative path to the plan being shipped. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.plan_file.

security_override_active.description: Whether --security-override flag was provided for this run.

oneOf.title: run_end
oneOf.description: Emitted once at the end of the run (Step 6 or on workflow stop).

steps_completed.description: Number of steps that completed before run ended.

revision_rounds.description: Number of revision loop rounds executed (0-2).

commit_sha.description: Short SHA of HEAD at run completion. NOTE: This is 'last known HEAD at run completion' not 'the commit containing this run's changes' (chicken-and-egg limitation: run_end emitted before final commit). OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.commit_sha.

plan_file.description: Relative path to the plan that was shipped.

oneOf.title: step_start
oneOf.description: Emitted at the beginning of each step or substep.

oneOf.title: step_end
oneOf.description: Emitted at the end of each step or substep.

oneOf.title: verdict
oneOf.description: Emitted when a verdict gate is evaluated.

step.description: Step in which the verdict was reached.

verdict.description: The verdict value. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.verdict.

agent_type.description: Agent type that produced the verdict. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.agent_type.

artifact.description: Path to the review artifact containing the full verdict.

oneOf.title: security_decision
oneOf.description: Emitted for security gate outcomes and overrides.

step.description: Step in which the security decision was made.

gate_verdict.description: Raw verdict from the security gate.

action.description: Action taken after the gate verdict.

override_reason.description: Free-text justification when action=override. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.security_override_reason.

effective_verdict.description: Effective verdict after action was applied.

oneOf.title: file_modification
oneOf.description: Emitted during merge (Step 3e) to record which files were modified per work group.

step.description: Step in which files were modified (typically step_3e_merge).

files_modified.description: Relative paths of files created or modified. OTel: span attribute devkit.ship.files.

work_group.description: Work group number that modified these files.

oneOf.title: error
oneOf.description: Emitted when a step fails unexpectedly (execution error, not a verdict FAIL).

step.description: Step in which the error occurred.

error.description: Error description. OTel: maps to span status ERROR + exception.message.
examples: Failed to create worktree: disk full

fatal.description: Whether the error stopped the workflow.

notes.otel_migration: Migration from JSONL to OTel spans requires a format adapter with span hierarchy reconstruction -- not a trivial field rename. The adapter must: (1) generate proper 128-bit trace_id from run_id, (2) reconstruct parent-child span hierarchy from step naming conventions (e.g. step_3c is a child of step_3), (3) handle concurrent spans (steps 4a/4b/4c run in parallel). When Kagenti provides an OTel collector endpoint, build the adapter then.
notes.hmac_field: At L3 (security_maturity=audited), every event includes an 'hmac' field containing HMAC-SHA256(event_json + previous_hmac, run_key). The run_key is persisted to .ship-audit-key-{run_id} (mode 0600) for post-run chain verification. This field is not defined in the schema as a required field because it is only present at L3.
notes.l1_retention: At L1 (advisory), audit logs are gitignored and ephemeral. At L2 (enforced), logs are committed via git add --force. At L3 (audited), logs and key files are committed.
notes.sequence_note: sequence is derived from wc -l of the log file at emit time. This is stateless -- no shell variable needs to persist across Bash tool calls.
